self_report.correct_answer: ((2n-1)/e)^((2n-1)/2) < 1·3·5···(2n-1) < ((2n+1)/e)^((2n+1)/2)  (the two bounds are swapped in the claim)
self_report.viz_verdict: The plot shows the claimed lower bound ((2n+1)/e)^((2n+1)/2) lies strictly above the claimed upper bound ((2n-1)/e)^((2n-1)/2) for all n≥1, so the chained inequality is structurally impossible.
self_report.notes: Bounds are swapped relative to the standard 1996 B-2 inequality; at n=1 the claim would require 1.16 < 1 < 0.61, which fails.
